jsonLd.title: Porter is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Porter invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Porter:
Porter is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter!
